title: September 2
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 2''' is the 245th day of the year (246th in leap years). There are 120 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1937|1937]] – [[Len Carlson]] is born.
*[[1940s#1946|1946]] – [[Walter Simonson]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 41|''Star Wars'' (1977) 41]] published.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 2]]'' published.
*2004 – [[Star Wars: The Official Magazine 52]] published.
*[[2009]] – [[Invasion 3|''Invasion'' 3]] published.
*[[2014]] – [[A New Dawn (novel)|''A New Dawn'']] published.
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 9|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 9]] published in Germany.
*[[2020]] – ''[[Imperial Troops|The Imperial Troops]]'' published in French.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Before the Awakening]]'' reprinted in paperback
*2025 – [[Before the Awakening (audiobook)|''Before the Awakening'' audiobook]] released.
*2025 – ''[[William Shakespeare's The Phantom of Menace: Star Wars Part the First]]'' reprinted.
*2025 – ''[[William Shakespeare's The Clone Army Attacketh: Star Wars Part the Second]]'' reprinted.
*2025 – ''[[William Shakespeare's Tragedy of the Sith's Revenge: Star Wars Part the Third]]'' reprinted.
